title: An exploratory open-label randomized trial comparing Risperidone long-Acting Injectable with oral antipsychotic medication in the treatment of early psychosis
notes: RCT; schizophrenia spectrum (DSM-5); pharma (risperidone LAI vs oral SGA); Canadian PIs (Malla Chue Roy); 2016; main results

title: Dopamine D2/3 Receptor Occupancy Following Dose Reduction Is Predictable With Minimal Plasma Antipsychotic Concentrations
notes: Open-label pharmacokinetic/neuroimaging study measuring receptor occupancy after dose reduction; not testing pharmacotherapy for MH; no clinical MH outcomes

title: The effects of desvenlafaxine on neurocognitive and work functioning in employed outpatients with major depressive disorder
notes: Open-label study (n=36); not an RCT

title: The Time Course of Effect of Multilayer-Release Methylphenidate Hydrochloride Capsules: A Randomized Double-Blind Study of Adults With ADHD
notes: US-based researchers (Wigal Childress); no Canadian site or PI identified

title: Effects of varenicline versus transdermal nicotine replacement therapy on cigarette demand on quit day in individuals with substance use disorders
notes: US-based study (Brown University); MacKillop co-author likely at US institution during study; no Canadian site

title: The THINC-it Tool for Cognitive Assessment and Measurement in Major Depressive Disorder: Sensitivity to Change
notes: Open-label vortioxetine study; not an RCT despite Canadian PI (McIntyre)

title: Efficacy and safety of balovaptan for socialisation and communication difficulties in autistic adults in North America and Europe
notes: Phase 3 RCT; ASD (DSM-5); pharma (balovaptan); Canadian site and PI (Anagnostou Toronto); 2022; main results

title: Head-To-Head Comparison of Vortioxetine Versus Desvenlafaxine in Patients With Major Depressive Disorder With Partial Response to SSRI Therapy: Results of the VIVRE Study
notes: RCT double-blind; MDD (DSM-5); pharma (vortioxetine vs desvenlafaxine); Canadian PI (McIntyre Toronto); 2023; main results

title: Combined Modality Intervention for ADHD With Comorbid Reading Disorders: A Proof of Concept Study
notes: RCT; ADHD+RD (DSM-5); pharma (methylphenidate vs placebo as adjunct); Canadian PI (Tannock Toronto); 2018; main results

title: Investigating the safety and efficacy of nabilone for the treatment of agitation in patients with moderate-to-severe Alzheimer's disease
notes: Study protocol only; no main results reported

title: Cost-effectiveness analysis of a randomized study of depression treatment options in primary care suggests stepped-care treatment may have economic benefits
notes: Cost-effectiveness/economic secondary analysis of an RCT; not main clinical results

title: The effect of intravenous ketamine on cognitive functions in adults with treatment-resistant major depressive or bipolar disorders
notes: Retrospective study of clinical data from CRTCE; explicitly states retrospective study design; not an RCT

title: D-cycloserine normalizes long-term motor plasticity after transcranial magnetic intermittent theta-burst stimulation in major depressive disorder
notes: Mechanistic neurophysiology study; outcome is motor evoked potentials not clinical MH outcomes; n=12 per group

title: Safety and efficacy of laquinimod for Huntington's disease (LEGATO-HD)
notes: Huntington disease is a neurodegenerative movement disorder not a DSM-5 mental health diagnosis; pharma targets motor function and caudate volume

title: Slowing Cognitive Decline in Major Depressive Disorder and Mild Cognitive Impairment: A Randomized Clinical Trial
notes: Intervention is cognitive remediation plus transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS); non-pharmacological

title: The Influence of Posttraumatic Stress Disorder on Treatment Outcomes of Patients With Borderline Personality Disorder
notes: Secondary analysis of psychotherapy RCT (DBT vs GPM); non-pharmacological intervention

title: A patient decision aid for antidepressant use in pregnancy: study protocol for a randomized controlled trial
notes: Study protocol only; no main results

title: Visual working memory deterioration preceding relapse in psychosis
notes: Hong Kong-based RCT; Honer (UBC) is co-author but PI and site are in Hong Kong

title: Effect of Aptensio XR (Methylphenidate HCl Extended-Release) Capsules on Sleep in Children with ADHD
notes: US-based clinical trials (analog classroom studies); Weiss as co-author but sites appear US-based

title: Clinical meaningfulness of ADAS-Cog subscale change in relation to goal attainment in patients on cholinesterase inhibitors
notes: Exploratory/secondary analysis of patients on cholinesterase inhibitors; not main RCT results

title: Serum and plasma BDNF and response in a randomized controlled trial of riluzole for treatment resistant depression
notes: US-based study (Yale Baylor); no Canadian site or PI

title: Feasibility and efficacy of a hospital-based violence intervention program on reducing repeat violent injury in youth
notes: Behavioral intervention (EDVIP) not pharmacotherapy; violent injury not a DSM-5 MH diagnosis

title: Rationale and design of an international randomized placebo-controlled trial of a 36-ingredient micronutrient supplement for children with ADHD
notes: Study protocol/design paper only; no main results

title: Efficacy and cost-effectiveness of intensive short-term dynamic psychotherapy for treatment resistant depression
notes: Psychotherapy intervention (ISTDP); non-pharmacological

title: Neural effects of oxytocin and mimicry in frontotemporal dementia: A randomized crossover study
notes: Mechanistic neuroimaging study; primary outcome is BOLD signal not clinical symptoms

title: The Impact of a Harry Potter-Based CBT Skills Curriculum on Suicidality and Well-being in Middle Schoolers
notes: CBT-based educational curriculum; non-pharmacological intervention

title: Treatment of mixed depression with theta-burst stimulation: results from a double-blind randomized sham-controlled clinical trial
notes: Theta-burst stimulation is neuromodulation; non-pharmacological

title: The safety and efficacy of fecal microbiota transplantation in bipolar disorder during depressive episodes
notes: Study protocol for pilot RCT; no main results

title: Building Emotional Awareness and Mental Health (BEAM): A Pilot RCT of an App-Based Program for Mothers of Toddlers
notes: App-based psychoeducation program; non-pharmacological

title: A cross-cultural randomized pilot trial of western-based and five elements music therapy for psychological well-being
notes: Music therapy intervention; non-pharmacological

title: An investigation of cortical thickness and antidepressant response in major depressive disorder: A CAN-BIND study report
notes: Secondary analysis of CAN-BIND RCT; reports neuroimaging correlates of treatment response not main clinical results

title: A double-blind placebo-controlled trial of minocycline on translocator protein distribution volume in treatment-resistant major depressive disorder
notes: Primary outcome is TSPO VT (PET neuroimaging biomarker) not clinical depression outcomes; mechanistic study (n=21)

title: Intranasal oxytocin for apathy in people with frontotemporal dementia (FOXY)
notes: Phase 2a/2b RCT; FTD/major neurocognitive disorder (DSM-5); pharma (oxytocin); Canadian multicentre trial; 2025; main results

title: Safety and Efficacy of Varenicline for Smoking Cessation in Alcohol-Dependent Smokers in Concurrent Treatment for Alcohol Use Disorder
notes: Pilot RCT placebo-controlled; tobacco+alcohol use disorder (DSM-5); pharma (varenicline); Canadian site (CAMH Toronto); 2020; main results
